repair_instructions: Add a clearly visible bookshelf or cubby storage unit in-frame (e.g., along a side/rear wall) and ensure it’s readable in at least one review view.
Add a clearly visible classroom wall clock near the teaching wall and ensure it’s readable in at least one view.
Place at least one clearly visible backpack (e.g., hung on chair backs or on floor beside a student desk) and ensure it is visible in a review view.

Make required small items unambiguous in the views: include a visible dry-erase marker set and a visible whiteboard eraser on the whiteboard tray; add visible worksheets and at least one clearly recognizable textbook.
Add a clearly identifiable paper tray (stacking tray style) on the teacher desk or a side cabinet where it is visible.
Improve lighting evidence by showing obvious daylight through windows (brighter window glazing and/or sunlight) and/or visible warm ceiling fixtures.
Raise these combined scores to the pass threshold: object_relevance, prompt_alignment
room_prompt:
[SCENESMITH_SCHOOL_CONTRACT_V1 room_id=classroom_02 profile=school_reference_20260710]
Immutable effective prompt SHA-256: ac8d297cc9a2d605f41b4bcd7abd52aac29bfd0f195875840342ee1e6a7da86f

Use warm cream/beige/off-white walls, light wood furniture and flooring, soft daylight, warm ceiling light, organized school displays, realistic scale, greenery, and clear humanoid/robot circulation. Nothing may float, visibly interpenetrate, block a door, or eliminate a usable walking/turning path.

ROOM-SPECIFIC REQUIRED CONTENTS:
Create exactly 12 student desks and exactly 12 corresponding student chairs. Orient them toward a strong front teaching wall/whiteboard with clear aisles. Include a teacher desk and teacher chair, storage cabinet, bookshelf or cubbies, bulletin board/educational posters, classroom clock, trash bin, at least one plant, and visible exterior daylight/windows. Add believable school-use details including textbooks, notebooks, folders/worksheets, pencil/marker holders, erasers/rulers, glue/scissors, water bottles, backpacks, storage bins and paper trays without clutter. Use a visibly different grouped or compact-row arrangement from classroom_01, with accessible walkways and supplies on selected desks.

--- FLOOR-PLANNER CONTEXT (SECONDARY) ---
Reference east-wing lower classroom with grouped seating.

clear_circulation.label: Door clearance, aisles, and humanoid/robot circulation are visibly usable.
clear_circulation.observation: Wide aisles and a clear perimeter path are visible around the desk layout, with no obvious pinch points for navigation.

collision_free_support.label: Objects are supported, correctly scaled, and visibly free of collisions/floating.
collision_free_support.observation: No obvious floating or severe interpenetration is visible; desk items and furniture appear to rest on surfaces/floor in the shown views.

daylight_and_warm_lighting.observation: Windows are visible, but clear exterior daylight contribution and warm ceiling lighting are not convincingly shown (windows appear flat/blank; no visible warm fixtures).
